final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing avatar for a content creator focusing on new energy vehicles, digital products, and lifestyle goods.

Style/medium: needs a universal, culturally neutral aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered, circular or square crop-friendly for social platforms
Subject: must include abstract or symbolic elements representing: new energy vehicles, digital technology, and lifestyle goods — exact visual metaphor is yours
Scene/backdrop: needs a clean, minimal background — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a professional, approachable atmosphere — exact light source is yours
Color palette: needs a globally harmonious direction avoiding region-specific color taboos — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must work harmoniously across Chinese and international social platforms; must avoid symbols, colors, or imagery that could offend specific cultural or religious groups
Avoid: must avoid national flags, religious symbols, political imagery, skin-tone-specific human figures, and regionally sensitive color combinations
